composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: RV30 declined 0.4pp to 35.8% (now 4.2pp above the 40% structural threshold) and the 1yr-high gap worsened 0.8pp to -49.3% (14.3pp beyond the -35% structural floor). Crisis entry requires z-score below -3.0; regime flip requires BTC to reclaim the 200d MA.
